about.bio:
I'm a documentary and street photographer based in Springfield, Missouri, with a focus on portraiture, cultural events, and long-form storytelling. My work centers on authentic human subjects — the unscripted moments and small details that reveal something larger about the people in front of my lens.
I frequently shoot on the streets of Nashville, Tennessee, and I'm currently preparing for an extended documentary trip through Central Europe and the Balkans this fall.
about.quote: I'm not trying to catch anyone off guard. I'm giving them time to stop guarding themselves. That's when the real photograph shows up.
